title: Federated States of Micronesia Disaster Management Reference Handbook
content: This Disaster Management Reference Handbook provides a comprehensive overview of FSM’s disaster risk environment, institutional structures, and operational practices.

title: Trust, governance, and climate disasters in the Indo-Pacific
content: This publication examines how climate-related emergencies can create epistemic stress situations in which uncertainty, competing narratives and political contestation undermine shared understandings of risk, preparedness and institutional responsibility.

title: Interns talk: ADPC's Young Professional platform on the topic "Strategic disaster risk communication in the digital age"
content: This session will explore how strategic communication can translate technical disaster risk information into clear, timely, and accessible public messages that support preparedness action.
snippet: This session will explore how strategic communication can translate technical disaster risk information into clear, timely, and accessible public messages that support preparedness action.

title: Monitoring and Predicting Floods Using Earth Observations for Planning and Preparedness
content: This training includes an overview and demonstration of flood monitoring tools based on remotely sensed optical observations, NASA's near real-time Global Flood Product, and several Observational Products for End-users from Remote Sensing Analysis.

title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning - Guidance and sectoral templates
content: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

title: Barbados Chamber of Commerce and Industry (BCCI)

snippet: The Barbados Chamber of Commerce and Industry (BCCI) provides its members with focused leadership and a strong voice to promote the interests of Barbados’ business sector.

title: Survivors sue Indonesian government over response to catastrophic Sumatra floods

title: The case for vehicle-integrated photovoltaics in disaster zones
content: A new IEA PVPS report makes a rigorous case that solar electric vehicles are not just transport, but rather a distributed, mobile, fuel-free emergency energy network that could redefine disaster preparedness.

title: From reaction to prevention: using remittances to act before climate crises hit
content: An initiative by the H&M Foundation and Mercy Corps and co-funded by global financial technology platform, Adyen, is testing how early-warning systems can trigger remittances before climate disasters strike.

title: H&M Foundation
content: H&M Foundation supports the industry in halving its greenhouse gas emissions every decade by 2050, while promoting a just transition for both people and the planet.

title: Building finds its balance in groundbreaking earthquake test
content: A timber building that kept itself centred through major shaking has aced a full‑scale earthquake test with no damage, with more than 60 industry professionals looking on.
snippet: A timber building that kept itself centred through major shaking has aced a full‑scale earthquake test with no damage, with more than 60 industry professionals looking on.

title: The next chapter in flood resilience: Open sourcing Google’s hydrology framework

snippet: Google has open-sourced its hydrology model to enable National Meteorological and Hydrological Services to integrate advanced AI-based flood forecasting into their own workflows.

title: Heat is a growing threat to the Hajj—even in spring

snippet: Temperatures during the pilgrimage in Saudi Arabia are rising as climate change accelerates, according to a growing body of research.

title: Food security and disaster risk reduction

snippet: IDR's Spotlight Series is a quarterly series showcasing emerging knowledge, research and issues in disaster risk reduction and resilience.

title: Uncertain Governance of a “Small Disaster”. Vulnerability to Recurrent Flooding in Lomé’s Second-hand Clothing Market (Togo)
content: Based on ethnographic fieldwork conducted between 2023 and 2025, this article offers a socio-environmental analysis of the recurrent floods affecting the urban markets in Lomé.
snippet: Based on ethnographic fieldwork conducted between 2023 and 2025, this article offers a socio-environmental analysis of the recurrent floods affecting the urban markets in Lomé.

title: Spring storms are becoming more common in Europe
content: Spring storms forming over the North Atlantic have become more common than they were 80 years ago, and this is due to climate change.
snippet: Spring storms forming over the North Atlantic have become more common than they were 80 years ago, and this is due to climate change.

title: Hidden lifelines: new research reveals vulnerability of subsea cables serving small island nations

title: Japan weather alert names unified for flooding, heavy rain, landslides, storm surges
content: Operation of a new system of "disaster prevention weather information" reorganizing warnings and advisories for hazards in Japan began May 28.
snippet: Operation of a new system of "disaster prevention weather information" reorganizing warnings and advisories for hazards in Japan began May 28.

title: Can AI help coastal cities prepare for rising seas and extreme events?

title: Maximum Information launches PsiClone ahead of North Atlantic hurricane season

title: Relative Niño index introduces more robust way to measure El Niño strength

title: Bank of Greece

title: Launch of COPE’s book: Lightning
